metadata.description: Curated resources for i18n/l10n in modern web applications covering libraries, standards, TMS platforms, AI translation, and best practices.

official_documentation.name: i18next Documentation
official_documentation.relevance: Primary i18n framework documentation. Covers configuration, plugins, and integration patterns.

official_documentation.name: react-i18next Documentation
official_documentation.relevance: React-specific i18next bindings. Hooks, components, and SSR patterns.

official_documentation.name: FormatJS / react-intl
official_documentation.relevance: ICU-focused i18n library. Official react-intl documentation and ICU message syntax.

official_documentation.name: vue-i18n Documentation
official_documentation.relevance: Official Vue 3 i18n solution. Composition API integration and tooling.

official_documentation.name: Angular Internationalization
official_documentation.relevance: Official Angular i18n guide. @angular/localize setup and AOT compilation.

official_documentation.name: next-intl Documentation
official_documentation.relevance: Next.js App Router i18n. Server components, middleware, and static generation.

official_documentation.name: LinguiJS Documentation
official_documentation.relevance: Minimal bundle i18n library. ICU syntax with React, Vue, and Svelte support.

official_documentation.name: typesafe-i18n Documentation
official_documentation.relevance: TypeScript-first i18n with compile-time type checking. Minimal runtime.

standards_specifications.name: ICU Message Format
standards_specifications.relevance: Canonical ICU message syntax specification. Pluralisation, select, formatting.

standards_specifications.name: Unicode CLDR
standards_specifications.relevance: Common Locale Data Repository. Plural rules, date/number formats by locale.

standards_specifications.name: BCP 47 Language Tags
standards_specifications.relevance: IETF standard for language tags (en-US, de-DE). Used in Accept-Language headers.

standards_specifications.name: MDN Intl API
standards_specifications.relevance: JavaScript Internationalization API. DateTimeFormat, NumberFormat, Collator.

standards_specifications.name: ECMAScript Internationalization API
standards_specifications.relevance: ECMA-402 specification. Defines Intl object and locale-sensitive operations.

tms_platforms.name: Phrase (formerly Memsource)
tms_platforms.relevance: Enterprise TMS with developer tools. GitHub/GitLab integration, CLI, API.

tms_platforms.name: Lokalise
tms_platforms.relevance: Developer-friendly TMS. Figma plugin, GitHub integration, collaborative translation.

tms_platforms.name: Crowdin
tms_platforms.relevance: Community and enterprise TMS. Open source free tier, crowdsourcing support.

tms_platforms.name: Transifex
tms_platforms.relevance: Localization platform with API-first approach. CI/CD integration, string detection.

tms_platforms.name: POEditor
tms_platforms.relevance: Simple TMS for smaller teams. GitHub integration, reasonable pricing.

tms_platforms.name: Locize
tms_platforms.relevance: i18next-native TMS by i18next creators. Real-time sync, versioning.

guides_tutorials.name: W3C i18n Best Practices for Spec Developers
guides_tutorials.relevance: W3C guidelines for internationalisation in web specifications. Authoritative reference for standards compliance.

guides_tutorials.name: Shopify i18n Best Practices for Front-End
guides_tutorials.relevance: Enterprise i18n patterns from Shopify engineering. UTF-8 encoding, text expansion, concatenation avoidance.

guides_tutorials.name: Lingui vs i18next Comparison
guides_tutorials.relevance: Official LinguiJS comparison with i18next. Bundle size, TypeScript, extraction differences.

guides_tutorials.name: react-i18next vs react-intl Comparison
guides_tutorials.relevance: Detailed comparison by i18next maintainers. Bundle size, features, use cases.

guides_tutorials.name: Best React i18n Libraries - Phrase
guides_tutorials.relevance: Comprehensive React i18n library comparison with code examples.

guides_tutorials.name: ICU Message Format Guide - Phrase
guides_tutorials.relevance: Practical ICU syntax guide with pluralisation and select examples.

guides_tutorials.name: ICU Message Format Guide - Lokalise
guides_tutorials.relevance: Complete ICU guide with CLDR plural rules and escaping patterns.

guides_tutorials.name: TypeScript i18n Best Practices
guides_tutorials.relevance: Type-safe i18n patterns in TypeScript. Type generation and validation.

guides_tutorials.name: Angular Localization Guide - Centus
guides_tutorials.relevance: Comprehensive Angular i18n setup with @angular/localize and alternatives.

guides_tutorials.name: i18n Benefits and Best Practices - Smartling
guides_tutorials.relevance: Business case for i18n. Planning strategies and workflow optimization.

guides_tutorials.name: ICU Message Formats Best Practices - Lingoport
guides_tutorials.relevance: ICU pitfalls and enterprise patterns. Nested arguments and translator-friendly syntax.

tools_cli.name: i18next-parser
tools_cli.relevance: Extract translation keys from code. Supports React, Vue, TypeScript.

tools_cli.name: @formatjs/cli
tools_cli.relevance: FormatJS extraction and compilation. ICU message validation.

tools_cli.name: Lingui CLI
tools_cli.relevance: LinguiJS string extraction and compilation. Catalog management.

tools_cli.name: i18next-http-backend
tools_cli.relevance: Load translations from backend/CDN. Lazy loading support.

tools_cli.name: i18next-browser-languagedetector
tools_cli.relevance: Browser locale detection. Cookie, localStorage, navigator, query string.

vscode_extensions.name: i18n Ally
vscode_extensions.relevance: VS Code extension for i18n. Inline annotations, auto-extraction, framework detection.

vscode_extensions.name: vscode-i18next
vscode_extensions.relevance: i18next key navigation and inline preview in VS Code.

rtl_resources.name: RTL Styling 101
rtl_resources.relevance: Comprehensive RTL CSS guide. Logical properties, BiDi, testing strategies.

rtl_resources.name: MDN CSS Logical Properties
rtl_resources.relevance: CSS logical properties reference. margin-inline-start, padding-block-end.

rtl_resources.name: Material Design Bidirectionality
rtl_resources.relevance: Google Material Design RTL guidelines. Icons, mirroring, layout patterns.

testing.name: Testing Library i18n Guide
testing.relevance: Testing React components with i18n. Provider wrapping patterns.

testing.name: Pseudolocalization
testing.relevance: Testing i18n readiness without real translations. Accent characters, expansion.

framework_specific.name: Next.js Internationalization Docs
framework_specific.relevance: Official Next.js i18n routing. App Router patterns and middleware.

framework_specific.name: Nuxt i18n Module
framework_specific.relevance: Official Nuxt.js i18n module. Auto-routing, SEO, lazy loading.

framework_specific.name: Remix i18n Guide
framework_specific.relevance: Remix framework i18n patterns. Loader-based translation loading.

npm_comparisons.name: npm compare: react-i18next vs react-intl
npm_comparisons.relevance: Live npm download stats and comparison. Bundle size, popularity trends.

npm_comparisons.name: Bundlephobia: i18next
npm_comparisons.relevance: Bundle size analysis for i18next and dependencies.

ai_translation.name: i18n-ai-translate
ai_translation.relevance: AI-powered translation for i18next JSON using ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, or local Ollama. Preserves file structure and variables.

ai_translation.name: i18nexus
ai_translation.relevance: AI translation management platform for React and Next.js. Automated workflows and CI/CD integration.

ai_translation.name: Locize Blog - What is i18n (2026)
ai_translation.relevance: Modern i18n practices including AI translation, RSC patterns, and metadata for context.

ai_translation.name: AI Translation Trends 2026
ai_translation.relevance: Industry trends including consensus-based translation, edge translation, and domain-specific models.

ai_translation.name: Forrester Wave TMS Q3 2025
ai_translation.relevance: Enterprise TMS market evaluation covering Phrase, Lokalise, Crowdin, and 9 other vendors.

ai_translation.name: MessageFormat 2.0 Documentation
ai_translation.relevance: ICU MessageFormat 2.0 specification (tech preview). New syntax for future adoption.
